'''barava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickle|nickle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickle|nickle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| barava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bærævæth|bærævæth]] || [[word:bærævæj|bærævæj]] || [[word:bærævæsh|bærævæsh]] || [[word:bærævæ|bærævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bararavath|bararavath]] || [[word:bararavaj|bararavaj]] || [[word:bararavash|bararavash]] || [[word:bararava|bararava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:baravath|baravath]] || [[word:baravaj|baravaj]] || [[word:baravash|baravash]] || [[word:barava|barava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:barafvath|barafvath]] || [[word:barafvaj|barafvaj]] || [[word:barafvash|barafvash]] || [[word:barafvaf|barafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baravatha|baravatha]] || [[word:baravaja|baravaja]] || [[word:baravasha|baravasha]] || [[word:baravaka|baravaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baravath|baravath]] || [[word:baravaj|baravaj]] || [[word:baravash|baravash]] || [[word:barava|barava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baravathal|baravathal]] || [[word:baravajal|baravajal]] || [[word:baravashal|baravashal]] || [[word:baravakal|baravakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baravathatha|baravathatha]] || [[word:baravajaja|baravajaja]] || [[word:baravashasha|baravashasha]] || [[word:baravaka|baravaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baravathan|baravathan]] || [[word:baravajan|baravajan]] || [[word:baravashan|baravashan]] || [[word:baravakan|baravakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baravathaoro|baravathaoro]] || [[word:baravajaoro|baravajaoro]] || [[word:baravashaoro|baravashaoro]] || [[word:baravakaoro|baravakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
